description:
1 / 16384 is a minimalist probability game where you pull the lever, press three buttons, and hope for triple 7s.

Inspired by the feel of Japanese slot machines, it focuses on the simple tension of the lever, the stop buttons, and the moment the reels line up.

There are no complex controls and no complicated rules.
The result is decided when you pull the lever, and each button stops one reel.

That is all.
But the numbers are recorded. The history stays. The odds keep staring back at you.
And somehow, one more pull always feels reasonable.

Features

• Simple controls: one lever and three buttons

• A 1 / 16384 jackpot for triple 7s

• Records and statistics for each matching number

• Daily history and all-time records

• Rare effects inspired by Japanese slot culture

• Steam achievements
description_short: Pull the lever, stop the reels, and chase the 1 / 16384 triple 7.
